scripts.test: mise exec node@22.10.0 -- node --import tsx/esm src/cli.ts 'test/passing.test.ts' 'test/lifecycle.test.ts' 2>&1 | tee /tmp/runner-result.txt; cat /tmp/runner-result.txt
scripts.test:fail: mise exec node@22.10.0 -- node --import tsx/esm src/cli.ts 'test/failing.test.ts' 2>&1 | tee /tmp/runner-fail-result.txt; cat /tmp/runner-fail-result.txt || true
scripts.test:coverage: mise exec node@22.10.0 -- node --import tsx/esm src/cli.ts --coverage 'test/passing.test.ts' 'test/lifecycle.test.ts' 2>&1 | tee /tmp/runner-coverage-result.txt; cat /tmp/runner-coverage-result.txt
